name: SA brand-impersonation via job aggregator (synthetic)
evidence:
TRANSNOVA RAIL INTAKE 2026

General Workers (x60), Cleaners (x40), Security Officers (x20).
Salary: R8 000 per month. No experience required.

Exciting opportunity at Transnova Rail for unemployed South African youth.
Apply online at https://tinyurl.com/transnova-intake or go to the official Transnova careers page.

Closing date: 30 June 2026.
notes: Synthetic. The employer brand is named but the only application channel is a shortened link — the template-ring signature. A real brand name must NOT reassure when the apply channel is a shortener/aggregator. Identifiers are fabricated.
